member.name: F:Mickey_Engine.Choice.text
member.summary: The text to be displayed on the screen

member.name: F:Mickey_Engine.Choice.script
member.summary: A new dialog script to continue the plot

member.name: T:Mickey_Engine.Config

member.summary: Application Window Text

member.name: P:Mickey_Engine.Config.width
member.summary: Width of the application window

member.name: P:Mickey_Engine.Config.height
member.summary: Height of the application window

member.name: P:Mickey_Engine.Config.style
member.summary: Game window style (default/fullscreen mode)

member.name: P:Mickey_Engine.Config.icon
member.summary: The path to the icon file from the configuration file

member.name: P:Mickey_Engine.Config.vertical_sync
member.summary: Vertical synchronization addition variable

member.name: P:Mickey_Engine.Config.console
member.summary: Console window display variable

member.name: P:Mickey_Engine.Config.archive
member.summary: The path to the archive file from the configuration file

member.name: P:Mickey_Engine.Config.language
member.summary: Interface language

member.name: P:Mickey_Engine.Config.saving_path

member.name: P:Mickey_Engine.Config.fps_show
member.summary: Variable of the fps counter display in the game

member.name: P:Mickey_Engine.Config.fps_limit
member.summary: Variable frame limit per second

The position of the character from existing

member.name: T:Mickey_Engine.Objects
member.summary: Variable class for storing game objects

member.name: F:Mickey_Engine.Objects.name
member.summary: The code name of the object with which it can be drawn or changed (English letters only!)

member.name: F:Mickey_Engine.Objects.type
member.summary: The type of object with which can understand how to draw it correctly (there are currently sprites and text)

member.name: F:Mickey_Engine.Objects.visible
member.summary: The variable responsible for the visibility of the object

member.name: F:Mickey_Engine.Objects.sprite
member.summary: Object Sprite

member.name: F:Mickey_Engine.Objects.text
member.summary: Object Text

member.name: F:Mickey_Engine.Objects.transparency
member.summary: Transparency of the object for animation effects (Initial value 255 - opaque, 0 - transparent)

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.Objects.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creating a new object
member.param: The code name of the object with which it can be drawn or changed (English letters only!)
The type of object with which can understand how to draw it correctly (there are currently sprites and text)
The variable responsible for the visibility of the object

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.Objects.GetID
member.summary: Object ID return function

member.name: T:Mickey_Engine.functions.Console
member.summary: Working class with the engine console

member.summary: The command function handles commands coming from the console
member.param: String type variable that denotes a command

member.summary: Class for storing engine console functions

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.functions.ConsoleFunctions.title(System.String)
member.summary: The function changes the window title
member.param: Argument that stores the new name of the window

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.functions.ConsoleFunctions.icon(System.String)
member.summary: The function changes the window icon
member.param: Argument that stores the new icon of the window

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.functions.ConsoleFunctions.console_show(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Console display function

member.summary: FPS limit change function

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.functions.ConsoleFunctions.fps_color(System.String)
member.summary: The function of changing the color of the fps counter

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.functions.ConsoleFunctions.sound_play(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Plays a file

member.summary: Stopping a file

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.functions.ConsoleFunctions.sound_pause(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pausing a file

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.functions.ConsoleFunctions.language(System.String)
member.summary: Language change function
member.param: Argument that stores the code name of the language

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.functions.ConsoleFunctions.getColor(System.String)
member.summary: Color exchanger function from string to SFML.Graphics.Color
member.param: The name of the color in the SFML system

member.summary: Zooming in or out of the camera

member.summary: Function of drawing objects by name
member.param: Name of the object from list objects

member.summary: Function of drawing objects by name in menu
member.param: Name of the object from list objects

member.summary: Function of drawing texts by name
member.param: Name of the text from the list objects

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.Drawing.MenuDrawText(System.String)

member.param: Name of the text from the list objects

member.name: T:Mickey_Engine.Archive
member.summary: Class of working with the archive of application files

member.name: P:Mickey_Engine.Archive.ZipPath
member.summary: The path to the archive with the application files

member.name: F:Mickey_Engine.Archive.ZipPass
member.summary: Password for the archive with the application files (if you do not have a password, leave the field empty!)

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.Archive.GetFile(System.String)
member.summary: The function of extracting files from the archive and writing them to MemoryStream
member.param: The name of the file to be written to memory

member.name: T:Mickey_Engine.Debug
member.summary: Application Debugger class

member.name: F:Mickey_Engine.Debug.fps_count
member.summary: Variable number of frames per second in the game

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.Debug.Log(System.String,System.ConsoleColor)
member.summary: Text output to the console using Console.WriteLine
member.param: Messages to output to the console
Text color for all messages in the console (optional parameter)

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.Debug.Error(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Error text output to the console using Console.WriteLine
member.param: Error messages to output to the console
Error file creation variable (enabled by default)

member.name: T:Mickey_Engine.Parse
member.summary: File processing class

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.Parse.objectList(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Parsing an object class from a json file
member.param: Name of the array of objects (non-optional parameter)
The path to the json file with the objects files
Variable for working with files from the archive

member.summary: Parsing a class of images from a json file
member.param: Name of the array of images (non-optional parameter)
The path to the json file with the images files
Variable for working with files from the archive

member.summary: Parsing a class of fonts from a json file
member.param: Name of the array of fonts (non-optional parameter)
The path to the json file with the fonts files
Variable for working with files from the archive

member.param: The path to the dialog file
Name of the array of dialogs (non-optional parameter)
Variable for working with files from the archive

member.summary: Parsing a class of languages from a json file
member.param: The path to the language file
Variable for working with files from the archive

member.summary: Parsing a class of inputs from a json file
member.param: The path to the input file
Variable for working with files from the archive

member.param: The path to the audio file
Name of the array of audios (non-optional parameter)
Variable for working with files from the archive

member.summary: Parsing a class of menu from a json file
member.param: The path to the menu file
Variable for working with files from the archive

member.summary: Dialog/character processing function

member.returns: Text with adding new line separations

member.summary: Input code name

member.name: F:Mickey_Engine.Language.code_name
member.summary: Language code name

member.name: F:Mickey_Engine.Language.name
member.summary: Language name

member.name: F:Mickey_Engine.Language.script
member.summary: Path to the script file

member.name: F:Mickey_Engine.Language.array_name
member.summary: Name of the dialog array

member.name: F:Mickey_Engine.Language.developer
member.summary: Language Developer

member.name: T:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamAPI
member.summary: Steam Api Function Class.

member.name: F:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamAPI.AppID
member.summary: The ID of your app. It can be installed via SW_SteamAPI.Init() or manually.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamAPI.Init(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the Steamworks library, Steamworks Api and connects to Steam via AppID.
member.param: An optional variable is needed to connect an application or game to Steam.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamAPI.Shutdown
member.summary: Completes the connection process with Steam can also occur automatically when the application or game is closed.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamAPI.IsSteamRunning
member.summary: Checks whether the Steam client is open or not.
member.returns: Returns a bool variable, true if the Steam client is open and false if closed.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamAPI.RunCallbacks(System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Launch callbacks to the client and the Steam Api in general.
member.param: Automatic start of callbacks, the initial value is false.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamAPI.RestartAppIfNecessary(Steamworks.AppId_t)
member.summary: Restarts applications if necessary.

member.name: T:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamFriends
member.summary: Steam user's Friends class.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamFriends.GetPersonaName
member.summary: Requests your nickname from Steam.
member.returns: Returns a nickname by string type.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamFriends.GetPlayerNickname(Steamworks.CSteamID)
member.summary: Requests the name of any user via the Steam Api.
member.param: ID of the user whose name you want to get.

member.name: T:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamAppList
member.summary: Application List class.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamAppList.GetAppName(Steamworks.AppId_t,System.String@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the name of the application.
member.param: ID of the application whose name you want to get.
Returns the application name via out.
The maximum value of the name, the initial value of 100.
member.returns: Returns the number of characters in the application name.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamAppList.GetAppInstallDir(Steamworks.AppId_t,System.String@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the path where the application is installed.
member.param: ID of the application whose path you want to get.
Returns the path to the folder of the installed application via out.
The maximum value of the path, the initial value is 300.
member.returns: Returns the number of characters in the path to the application.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamAppList.GetInstalledApps(Steamworks.AppId_t[],System.UInt32)
member.summary: Requests all installed applications and games from Steam.
member.param: Application IDs must be specified in the array.
The maximum value of the ids, the initial value is 100.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamAppList.GetNumInstalledApps
member.summary: Requests from the Steam Api the number of all installed games and programs from the user's library.
member.returns: Returns the number of all installed games and apps.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamAppList.GetAppBuildId(Steamworks.AppId_t)
member.summary: Requests the application build ID from the Steam Api.
member.param: ID of the application whose build you want to get.
member.returns: Returns the ID of the application build.

member.name: T:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUser
member.summary: Class of work with the Steam user.

member.name: F:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUser.steamID
member.summary: The user ID can be set via SW_SteamAPI.Init() or manually.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUser.GetPlayerSteamLevel
member.summary: Requests the user profile level via the Steam Api.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUser.GetSteamID
member.summary: Requests a user ID via the Steam Api.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUser.EndAuthSession(Steamworks.CSteamID)
member.summary: Ends the authentication session.
member.param: ID of the user to end authentication session.

member.name: T:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUserStats
member.summary: Steam User Statistics class.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUserStats.StoreStats
member.summary: Steam Store Status.
member.returns: Returns the response states of the Steam store.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUserStats.GetNumAchievements
member.summary: Requests the number of all app achievements from the Steam Api.
member.returns: Returns the number of all achievements that you can use in SW_SteamUserStats.GetAchievementName().

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUserStats.GetAchievement(System.String,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Requests the Steam Api if the user has this achievement.
member.param: Code name of the Steam achievement.
member.returns: Returns the variable whether the user has this achievement.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUserStats.GetAchievementAndUnlockTime(System.String,System.Boolean@,System.UInt32@)
member.summary: Requests the Steam Api whether the user has this achievement and at what time it was received.
member.param: Code name of the Steam achievement.
member.returns: Returns the variable whether the user has this achievement and at what time it was opened.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUserStats.GetAchievementIcon(System.String)
member.summary: Requests an achievement icon from the Steam Api.
member.param: Code name of the Steam achievement.
member.returns: Returns the icon as a number.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUserStats.GetAchievementName(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Requests from the Steam Api the codename of the achievement via an ordinal number.
member.param: The sequential number of the achievement.
member.returns: Returns the codename of the achievement.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUserStats.ClearAchievement(System.String)
member.summary: Deleting an achievement from a user.
member.param: Code name of the Steam achievement.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUserStats.SetAchievement(System.String)
member.summary: Changes the app achievement values for the user.
member.param: Code name of the Steam achievement.
member.returns: Returns the status of the change processing.

member.name: T:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUtils
member.summary: A class of utilities for working with Steam.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUtils.GetAppID
member.summary: Requests the application ID from the file "steam_appid.txt" or from an already running program using SW_SteamAPI.Init().

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUtils.GetSteamUILanguage
member.summary: Asks the Steam client about the interface language.
member.returns: Returns the interface language in English, for example "english".

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUtils.GetServerRealTime
member.summary: Receives the server in real time.
member.returns: Returns server values in real time.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUtils.IsOverlayEnabled
member.summary: Checks whether the Steam overlay process is running in this application or game.
member.returns: Returns true if the overlay process is added and false if not.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUtils.IsSteamRunningInVR
member.summary: Checks if the game or applications are running via Steam VR.
member.returns: Returns true if the app or game is open via Steam VR, and false if not.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUtils.GetSecondsSinceAppActive
member.summary: Gets seconds from the moment the app is activated.

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.SW_SteamUtils.GetIPCountry
member.summary: Gets the region of the country via IP.
member.returns: Returns the region in English, for example "US".

member.name: T:Mickey_Engine.StringExtensions
member.summary: String Extensions

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.StringExtensions.ToUTF8(System.String)
member.summary: Text encoding changes

member.name: T:Mickey_Engine.temp_position
member.summary: Temporary variable class for storing game positions of characters

member.name: F:Mickey_Engine.temp_position.code_name
member.summary: Character code name

member.name: F:Mickey_Engine.temp_position.pos
member.summary: Position (left, center, right)

member.name: M:Mickey_Engine.temp_position.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creating a new temporary position
